_comment: OpenClaw (coder agent) -- EastRouter config. Real config; secrets REDACTED on purpose (loaded from env).

fallback_model._note: Used ONLY if EastRouter is down. Documented in README. Avoids the EastRouter-only penalty if the API drops.

slack._app: SEPARATE Slack app from Hermes, with its own bot identity (coder = 'pulsedesk-coder'; manager = 'Forge-Unplug'). REQUIRED for genuine agent-to-agent: a single shared app self-drops its own messages, so the manager could never trigger the coder.
slack._dispatch_note: allowBots:true PLUS allowFrom listing the manager's bot user id (U0BBYPJ3YP7) is what makes Hermes's @mention actually DISPATCH the coder's agent. Without allowFrom the mention is received but no agent run starts.
slack.report_format: What I Did / What's Left / What Needs Your Call

_tools_note: tools.profile=minimal + alsoAllow [group:fs, group:runtime, group:messaging]. group:messaging enables the 'message' tool so the coder posts build reports to #agent_log.
